metadata.description: SMART skill-manager ecosystem: phase-aware skill orchestration across standalone skill sources (including Anthropic, obra/superpowers, UI/UX, and marketing skills), atomic planning, persistent project memory, step-by-step execution, local code review, systematic debugging, and security auditing, plus bounded learning memory (USER/AGENT-MEMORY) and Vision Lock project intelligence.

plugins.name: smart
plugins.description: Project intelligence orchestrator: builds a truthful shared model, enforces Vision Lock before planning/code, preserves Project Mind plus learning memory (USER/AGENT-MEMORY), and installs or creates only the capabilities required for the next best action.

plugins.name: project-planner
plugins.description: Adaptive idea discovery and planning: landscape research, budget	imes quality, Project Brief, epistemic/viability review, mandatory Vision Lock, and a risk-ordered atomic execution plan.

plugins.name: project-memory
plugins.description: Durable project intelligence: Project Mind + resume state, bounded learning memory (USER/AGENT-MEMORY/SOUL), session search, providers, and brief/plan/decisions/research runway.

plugins.name: step-pilot
plugins.description: Evidence-gated plan execution: requires confirmed Vision Lock, runs one scoped task through fresh verification and memory consolidation, and enters recovery instead of thrashing.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Local diff review before merge/release — no GitHub required. Five axes: correctness, readability, security smells, tests, plan conformance. Verdict with severity-sorted findings.

plugins.name: debug-detective
plugins.description: Systematic debugging: reproduce -> isolate -> hypothesize -> minimal fix -> regression test -> record the root cause in STATE.md. Stops agents from thrashing in error loops.

plugins.name: security-check
plugins.description: Pre-release security audit: leaked secrets, dependency vulnerabilities, input validation, authz/RLS, and safe defaults — with a prioritized fix list. Run before every deploy.
